REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501,DEFENDANT MARCIA THOMAS, JENNIFER DEBERRY, DPPM, INC. D/B/A/ ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED: (A) MOTION TO STRIKE CONTRACT-BASED ATTORNEY'S FEES CLAIM WAS WITHDRAWN; (2) AS TO THE CCP 1021.5 FEES, DEFENDANTS FAIL TO CITE ANY CASES WHERE SUCH REQUEST WAS DISPOSED OF AT THE PLEADING STAGE. MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) TO SUPPORT ASSERTIONS OF MALICE, OPPRESSION, OR FRAUD. ALL AMENDMENTS SHALL BE MADE IN BOLD FONT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501).

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-23-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Continued To Mar-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Liku Madoshi, 415.981.5411 for Defendant/Moving party Alison Crane.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MARCIA THOMAS, JENNIFER DEBERRY, DPPM, INC. D/B/A/ ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Attorneys Fees is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Strike request for attorney's fees is DENIED: (a) motion to strike contract-based attorney's fees claim was withdrawn; (2) as to the CCP 1021.5 fees, Defendants fail to cite any cases where such request was disposed of at the pleading stage. Motion to Strike Request for Punitive Damages is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) to support assertions of malice, oppression, or fraud. All amendments shall be made in bold font. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Continued To Jan-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Claim For Attorneys Fees
